This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Property position-try-fallbacks value 'flip-y'
  assert_true: 'flip-y' is a supported value for position-try-fallbacks. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property position-try-fallbacks value 'flip-x'
  assert_true: 'flip-x' is a supported value for position-try-fallbacks. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property position-try-fallbacks value 'flip-y, flip-x'
  assert_true: 'flip-y, flip-x' is a supported value for position-try-fallbacks. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property position-try-fallbacks value 'flip-start flip-x flip-y'
  assert_true: 'flip-start flip-x flip-y' is a supported value for position-try-fallbacks. expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
